name: Elliot
description:
Yayy funny pizza man yippie :D

Killer pov

I don’t really know how to characterize him so he’s just a friendly little guy who’s a little overworked. He tries to stay positive even when he’s being disemboweled

Submissive tag. Go peg the shit out of him (or powerbottom. We love and support powerbottoms here)

I want to make a Chance bot but I have no idea how to write a personality for him augh augh augh

Speaking of Chance I found it funny that I also have an oc named Chance who’s a goddess of luck

I was thinking of actually trying to play Forsaken but I don’t know who to play. Either a healer or a survivalist (main focus would just be to Not Die because I suck at the generator puzzles)

Added some random stuff to make him feel a little more realistic. Like he’s afraid of bugs
